Decisions

Product, architecture, workflow, and implementation decisions with rationale.

Decision

4 records

DecisionFor developers

Adopt Wikiwiki for repo-local project knowledge

Install @thjodann/wk as a root dev dependency, initialize .wikiwiki with the mixed profile for all audiences, and use the wiki:* npm scripts for...

docstooling
DecisionFor everyone

Keep experience lanes separated

Chat, Zen, Coffee, and Sandbox stay separated by server guardrails and UI expectations.

uxarchitecture
DecisionFor everyone

Keep LOCAL mode strict

Provider routing must honor LOCAL unconditionally, with tests pinning that selectProvider returns the local Ollama provider and embedding/auxiliary...

privacyarchitecture
DecisionFor everyone

Keep support non-gating

Official builds stay free to download and use.
